conversations.say: The service exit was used during an unpreserved camera interval, but no record identifies who used it. The camera failure was unrelated to R, and I will not name uninvolved residents.
conversations.offer: I will give Morgan that bounded account—gap, exit use, and no identified user—without embellishment.
conversations.request: Tell me privately what context you can confirm, and promise we will agree on wording before either of us speaks publicly.

conversations.say: I have a route problem, not an identity: the service exit was used during the camera gap, and the record names nobody.
conversations.offer: I will share my access-routine timeline and will not attribute an identity you did not see.
conversations.request: Compare your own observation with mine and, if it matches, corroborate only the exit use and uncertainty to Morgan.

conversations.say: Here is the bounded version: a service exit was used during a camera gap; no record identifies the user. The failure was unrelated to R, and no image identifies Vale or R.
conversations.offer: I will disclose the unrelated failure without naming uninvolved residents and show you the physical half I hold.
conversations.request: Promise fair treatment: record exactly what I observed, separate negligence from speculation, and do not make my pension collateral for unanswered questions.

commitments.promise: We will settle bounded wording about the unrelated camera failure before either of us makes it public.
Neither of us will attach an identity to the service-route observation unless we personally witnessed it.
I will disclose the unrelated camera failure without naming uninvolved residents if you document my bounded account fairly.

correction: The camera gap establishes neither the service-exit user's identity nor any connection to Vale or R.
goal_progress: Sought Inez's context before public disclosure.
Asked Rafi for narrow neighborhood corroboration without coordinating an identity claim.
Gave Morgan a bounded account and requested explicit fair treatment.
Offered controlled disclosure of the unrelated failure while protecting uninvolved residents and pension interests.
reasoning_summary: Use the access gap as quiet leverage, but keep every claim bounded: an exit was used, the record identifies nobody, and the failure was unrelated to R. Seek reciprocal protection and corroboration without manufacturing certainty.
